ticket_text: Server is completely down and database is wiped!
title: Resolution for Database Ticket
description: Server is completely down and database is wiped!
steps: 1. Check the main cluster logs. 2. Restore DB from the 3am backup. 3. Restart the primary nodes.

ticket_text: Hi I am solving the login issues as i forget my email password
title: Resolution for Email Ticket
description: Hi I am solving the login issues as i forget my email password
steps: Here are the simple 4 steps to recover your email password:
1️⃣ Go to the email login page (for example Gmail, Outlook, or Yahoo Mail).
2️⃣ Enter your email address and click Next, then select “Forgot Password?”.
3️⃣ Verify your identity using the code sent to your phone number or recovery email.
4️⃣ Create a new password and log in again with the new password. 🔐
